positive: Minimalist silhouette of a celestial bear howling under a stylized crescent moon. The bear's pose should be dramatic and artistic, with clean, flowing lines. Incorporate subtle starry constellations and nebula washes in deep indigo, sapphire, and muted teal tones. The composition should be centered, framed against a solid, contrasting cream background. Style: Modern vector illustration mixed with delicate watercolor texture. Clean edges, high contrast, print-ready, perfect for textile printing, highly detailed yet sparse.
negative: low resolution, blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, messy, busy background, gradient, photo realistic
